name: dreamprice
description: DreamPrice project plugin — custom agents, hooks, and skills for the DreamPrice world model build

agents.name: causal-estimator
agents.description: Estimates per-category price elasticities via DML-PLIV and validates Hausman instruments. Outputs frozen elasticity configs for CausalDemandDecoder.

agents.name: experiment-tracker
agents.description: Manages W&B ablation sweeps, collects run results, computes IQM + 95% bootstrap CIs, and produces statistical summary tables.
